3DAnimations.descripcion:
Music videos for the song Kloufrens by bad bunny. The goal of this project was to exploit to the maximum the motion tracking module of blender.

[Short Film](https://www.behance.net/gallery/226850129/KlouFrens-3D-animation)

Can a man be saved through a memory? We bring to the screen the most iconic line in Hispanic literature: the day Colonel Aureliano Buendía remembered that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice. A visual journey to the heart of One Hundred Years of Solitude.

[Short Film](https://www.behance.net/gallery/211762851/100-year-of-solitude-(100-anos-de-soledad))
This time I'm testing the grease pencil from the latest Blender version.

Programming.descripcion:
Add interactive dialogue to your game in minutes.

Dialofy is the simplest and most versatile way to implement dialogue systems in Unity:


✔ Visual node-based editor


✔ Ready-to-use customizable UI


✔ Multi-language support (automatic translation coming soon)


✔ No coding required


🔥 [Asset Store](https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/tools/behavior-ai/dialofy-easy-dialogue-system-312875)

🔥🔥 Welcome to Trap Night 🔥🔥

Trap Night is a rhythmic video game where you must tap on the little figures at the precise moment to rap and thus defeat your opponents. Inspired by rap battles and trap music. Trap Night features the best beats with the best artists.

[Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.MaravStress.Trapnight)
